title: Spicy Fluffy Light Ethiopian Veal Stir-fry
description: This low-sodium-friendly spicy-fluffy light Ethiopian veal stir-fry combines tender veal with a fragrant blend of spices and vegetables for a flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until translucent.
Add bell pepper and zucchini to the pan with a pinch of cayenne pepper, stir for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are soft but not mushy.
Gently place veal on top of vegetables in the pan, skin-side down. Cover and reduce heat to low, allowing them to cook undisturbed for about 10-12 minutes or until a crust forms on the bottom side.
Deglaze the pan with low-sodium beef broth by adding tomato paste and stirring well, scraping up any stuck bits from the bottom of the pan. Bring liquid to a simmer.
Stir in thyme leaves and oregano. Lower heat to maintain a gentle simmer for 10-15 minutes or until veal is fully cooked through. Serve hot.
